perturbation.original_text: Client will be promoted as the preferred and dominant reseller of Vitamins in the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. As such, Excite may not display banner advertising and/or promotional placements for any of Client's Competitors that are, in the aggregate, of equal or greater prominence and exposure than the aggregate of Client's links, advertising banners and promotional placements on the pages of the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. For purposes of this Agreement, Client's Competitors means those merchants identified in Exhibit D attached hereto. Client may update
perturbation.changed_text: Client will be promoted as the preferred and dominant vendor of Vitamins in the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. As such, Excite may not display banner advertising and/or promotional placements for any of Client's Rivals that are, in the aggregate, of equal or greater prominence and exposure than the aggregate of Client's links, advertising banners and promotional placements on the pages of the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. For purposes of this Agreement, Client's Rivals means those merchants identified in Exhibit D attached hereto. Client may update
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'reseller' to 'vendor' and 'Competitors' to 'Rivals' creates confusion whether these terms are supposed to have any kind of difference and therefore creates an in-text contradiction. It is not clear that the agreement is still reffering the same meaning of 'Client's Competitors' and 'Rivals', where it is reffered in 'Client's Rivals means those merchants identified in Exhibit D attached hereto'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Client will be promoted as the preferred and dominant vendor of Vitamins in the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. As such, Excite may not display banner advertising and/or promotional placements for any of Client's Rivals that are, in the aggregate, of equal or greater prominence and exposure than the aggregate of Client's links, advertising banners and promotional placements on the pages of the Health Channel on the WebCrawler Site during the term of this Agreement. For purposes of this Agreement, Client's Rivals means those merchants identified in Exhibit D attached hereto. Client may update
perturbation.justification: The change from 'reseller' to 'vendor' and 'Competitors' to 'Rivals', while seemingly minor, introduces ambiguity and potential contradiction. The contradicted text explicitly states that 'Client's Rivals means those merchants identified in Exhibit D attached hereto'. If 'Rivals' is now interpreted differently from 'Competitors', this could lead to a contradiction, as Exhibit D may have been created with 'Competitors' in mind. Therefore it creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: A link to the Client Site (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) will be displayed in rotation on the first page of the health & fitness department of the WebCrawler Shopping Channel during the term of the Agreement. Excite estimates, but does not guarantee, delivery of [*****] impressions of the Client promotional placement described in this Section 2(b) during [*****] of the term of the Agreement and [*****] such impressions during [*****] of the term of the Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: A link to the Client Webpage (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) will be displayed in rotation on the first page of the health & fitness department of the WebCrawler Shopping Channel during the term of the Agreement. Excite estimates, but does not guarantee, delivery of [*****] impressions of the Client promotional placement described in this Section 2(b) during [*****] of the term of the Agreement and [*****] such impressions during [*****] of the term of the Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing 'Client Site' with 'Client Webpage' introduces ambiguity. It's unclear if these refer to the same online location. The in-text contradiction arises because the entire agreement uses Client Site as the established term, as used in 'Client Site from the Excite Network' therefore by interchanging with 'Client Webpage' creates uncertainty about whether the promotional placement will direct users to the correct designated online destination.
perturbation.contradicted_text: A link to the Client Webpage (consistent with the format used on similar links on the same page) will be displayed in rotation on the first page of the health & fitness department of the WebCrawler Shopping Channel during the term of the Agreement. Excite estimates, but does not guarantee, delivery of [*****] impressions of the Client promotional placement described in this Section 2(b) during [*****] of the term of the Agreement and [*****] such impressions during [*****] of the term of the Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Client Site' to 'Client Webpage' introduces a misaligned terminology as defined in the Perturbation Definitions, creating uncertainty about the designated online destination for promotional placement. Since the contract primarily uses 'Client Site', this change creates a contradiction because it's unclear whether the 'Client Webpage' and 'Client Site' refer to the same location, contradicting the established term throughout the agreement, and potentially leading to misdirection of users.

perturbation.original_text: Excite will have sole responsibility for providing, hosting and maintaining, at its expense, the Excite Network. Excite will have sole control over the "look and feel" of the Excite Network including, but not limited to, the display, appearance and placement of the parties' respective names and/or brands and the promotional links, but such control shall not permit Excite to modify Client's logos and trademarks and it does not relieve Excite from its obligations regarding Client's preferred and dominant sponsorship status as set forth elsewhere in this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Excite will have sole responsibility for providing, hosting and maintaining, at its expense, the Excite Website. Excite will have sole control over the "look and feel" of the Excite Website including, but not limited to, the display, appearance and placement of the parties' respective names and/or brands and the promotional links, but such control shall not permit Excite to modify Client's logos and trademarks and it does not relieve Excite from its obligations regarding Client's preferred and dominant sponsorship status as set forth elsewhere in this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By replacing 'Excite Network' with 'Excite Website,' we introduce a contradiction with all other sections of the document that refer to 'Excite Network'. It's now ambiguous whether 'Excite Website' has the same scope as the 'Excite Network'. The specific in-text contradiction is 'Excite will have sole responsibility for providing, hosting and maintaining, at its expense, the Excite Website' where this perturbation can lead to a dispute over the extent of Excite's responsibilities and control.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Excite will have sole responsibility for providing, hosting and maintaining, at its expense, the Excite Website. Excite will have sole control over the "look and feel" of the Excite Website including, but not limited to, the display, appearance and placement of the parties' respective names and/or brands and the promotional links, but such control shall not permit Excite to modify Client's logos and trademarks and it does not relieve Excite from its obligations regarding Client's preferred and dominant sponsorship status as set forth elsewhere in this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: While the change from 'Excite Network' to 'Excite Website' could potentially lead to ambiguity, the provided 'Contradicted Text' is identical to the 'Changed Text'. This means the potential contradiction exists regardless of the change. Further, the explanation hinges on other sections of the document referencing 'Excite Network', which are not provided here, making it impossible to determine if a direct contradiction exists based solely on the given excerpts. Because it cannot be determined with certainty if it's a strong contradiction, the output must be 'NO'.
